word: H8528 - תֵּל מֶלַח - Têl Melach - tale meh'-lakh - Tel-melah

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּל מלח

Transliteration: têl melach

Phonetic: tale meh'-lakh

BDB Definition:

Tel-melah = "mound of salt"
  1. a place in Babylon from which some exiles of unknown parentage came; returned to Jerusalem with Zerubbabel

Origin: from H8510 and H4417

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
